title: Zipp CPVP Pack
description: Zipp CPVP Pack brings a clean and clear PvP experience. It features short swords, a black UI, low fire, no particles, and a smaller totem pop-up, so nothing gets in your way during fights. Perfect for players who want maximum visibility and focus in every
body:
# Zipp CPVP Pack ⚔️

The **Zipp CPVP Pack** is designed for players who want a clean and distraction-free CPvP experience.  
Every texture has been carefully adjusted to give you maximum visibility during fights, without unnecessary details that get in the way. 👀

## Features ✨

- **Short swords** 🗡️ – perfect for better screen visibility in close combat.  
- **Black UI** 🖤 – minimalistic and easy on the eyes.  
- **No UI background** ❌🖼️ – nothing blocking your view of the action.  
- **Low fire** 🔥 – keeps your screen clear even while burning.  
- **No particles** 💨 – nothing will block your view during hits or critical combos.  
- **Small totem pop-up** 🛡️ – so clutch moments won’t cover your screen.  

## Why this pack? 💡

This pack focuses on **clarity, performance, and comfort**.  
No flashy effects, no distractions — just a simple style that helps you concentrate on what matters most: winning fights. 🏆

Whether you’re playing duels, UHC, or practice servers, the **Zipp CPVP Pack** keeps your gameplay smooth and sharp. ⚡  

---

## Previews 📸

Check out some screenshots to see the pack in action:  
![Items & Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HM3gCN4y/images/6adbdaba06c4f9a9d2be6e9868602880c85c9716.png)  
![UI & HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HM3gCN4y/images/3e59eec68e8804a08dbe55bf55214fcaf975ac9b.png)  
![Fire & Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HM3gCN4y/images/34b8d5c151098d6d39438d5b5c04ed26a7a8a46c.png)  
![Totem Pop-up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HM3gCN4y/images/d2ce7edcd1eac0d43d58f6ecb55530ca8f1285ff.png)  

---

🔹 *Created with competitive PvP in mind, by Zipp.*
